name: com.gameframex.unity.readassets
description:
GameFrameX ReadAssets — Android APK asset reading package. Provides direct access to files in the Android APK's assets/streaming directory that are not accessible through standard .NET file I/O, using native Java class bridging. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

GameFrameX ReadAssets — Android APK 资源读取功能包。提供对 Android APK 中 assets/streaming 目录下文件的直接访问，通过原生 Java 类桥接解决标准 .NET 文件 I/O 无法读取的问题。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
